title: A Day in the Life: Highlighting Careers in Biopharmaceutical Manufacturing
description: "A Day in the Life" video series will provide an immersive look into biomanufacturing careers
text:
The biopharmaceutical manufacturing industry is experiencing unprecedented growth, with the global market projected to exceed $570 billion by 2032. However, workforce shortages present a critical challenge, with the sector facing a projected 35% talent deficit by 2030.
This proposal outlines a strategic initiative, "A Day in the Life," to address the talent gap through an engaging six-video series that educates, inspires, and prepares the next generation of biopharma professionals. By leveraging industry partnerships, storytelling, and career guidance, this project will create a sustainable, scalable workforce development tool benefiting the NIIMBL community and the broader biopharmaceutical ecosystem.
Humanizing the workforce— highlighting scientists and operators developing and producing treatments, technicians ensuring product safety, and regulatory professionals maintaining compliance—this initiative aims to reshape public sentiment with young adults about the industry. By revealing the careers as accessible and relatable, a goal of this project is to change public perception with young adults of the industry and increase recruitment of talent to these rewarding careers.
